affected_pattern: Handover-heavy customers in high-mobility routes show 10x session counts
root_cause: LTE-to-5G inter-RAT handover double-counting — the billing mediation layer counted both the LTE closeout billing record and the 5G startup billing record as separate billable sessions instead of stitching them, inflating session and volume counts.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Handover Session-Stitching Defect pattern
telecom billing TS 32.298 section on session continuity flags referenced in engineering ticket
Spike magnitude correlates with customer mobility score from RAN analytics
recommended_action: Re-enable the session-continuity flag in the mediation config
Re-rate affected sessions by stitching paired billing records
Issue credits for the over-counted sessions
Add a cross-RAT continuity counter to the dashboard
